data.name: Footer_NexusModsAPILimit_Text
data.comment: Needs 4 placeholders for Hourly Remaining/Limit and Daily Remaining/Limit

data.name: Mod_ExtenderStatus_RequiresVersion
data.value: Requires Script Extender v{0} or Higher

data.name: Mod_ExtenderStatus_MissingUpdaterInfo
data.value: You are missing the Script Extender updater (DWrite.dll), which is required

data.name: Mod_ExtenderStatus_NotFoundInfo
data.value: No installed Script Extender version found\nIf you've already downloaded it, try opening the game once to complete the installation process

data.name: Window_AppUpdate_Available
data.value: {0} {1} is now available.\nYou have version {2} installed.

data.name: Window_AppUpdate_DownloadToolTip
data.value: Download and install the latest update.

data.name: Window_ModProperties_Config_Header_UpdateSources_ToolTip
data.value: These properties affect where the mod manager checks for the mod's updates.

data.name: Window_SettingsWindow_Button_LaunchParams_ToolTip
data.value: Parameters to pass to the game executable when launching the game through the mod manager

data.name: Window_SettingsWindow_Button_DeleteCache_ToolTip
data.value: Delete the local mod cache, located in the mod manager's Data folder

data.name: CommandBar_Button_ExportOrderToArchive_ToolTip
data.value: Export Active Mods to Zip As...

data.name: CommandBar_LaunchGameFlyout_Button_OpenGameFolder_FileExplorer
data.value: Open Parent Folder in File Explorer...

data.name: CommandBar_LaunchGameFlyout_Button_OpenGameFolder_Dopus
data.value: Open Parent Folder in Directory Opus...

data.name: Settings_ActionOnGameLaunch_Header_ToolTip
data.value: When the game launches through the mod manager, this action will be performed on the mod manager window

data.name: Keybinding_CheckAllModUpdates_ToolTip
data.value: Check all sources of mod updates (GitHub, Nexus, etc.)

data.name: Keybinding_ExportOrderToZip_ToolTip
data.value: Export all active mods to a zip file

data.name: Keybinding_ExportOrderToArchiveAs_ToolTip
data.value: Export all active mods to an archive file of a chosen type

data.name: Keybinding_ReloadMods_ToolTip
data.value: Reload mod data without doing a full reload (i.e. reload metadata like the name)

data.name: Keybinding_ToggleVersionGeneratorWindow_ToolTip
data.value: A tool for mod authors to generate version numbers for a mod's meta.lsx

data.name: Keybinding_ImportNexusModsIds
data.value: Import Nexus Mods Data from Archives...

data.name: Keybinding_ImportOrderFromSaveAsNew
data.value: Import Order from Save As New Order...

data.name: Keybinding_MoveSelectedMods
data.value: Moved Selected Mods to Opposite List

data.name: Keybinding_ToggleFilterFocus
data.value: Toggle Focus Filter for Current List

data.name: Keybinding_ToggleNXMLinkDownloader_ToolTip
data.value: Download a NexusMods link for a mod file or a collection

data.name: Keybinding_OrganizeModPaks_ToolTip
data.value: Automatically reorganize mod paks.\nInactive mods will be moved to Mods_Disabled, and active mods (in the Mods_Disabled folder) will be moved to the Mods folder.

data.name: Keybinding_GenerateCache_ToolTip
data.value: Write all available mods to the various cache files in the settings folder, allowing you to manually set the ids of installed mods. Normally, only configured mods are saved (i.e. a mod with a Nexus Mods id set).

data.name: Keybinding_DeleteCache_ToolTip
data.value: Delete the Nexus Mods and mod.io cache files in the settings folder.

data.name: TopMenu_File
data.comment: Start with an underscore for keyboard accessibility

data.name: TopMenu_Edit
data.comment: Start with an underscore for keyboard accessibility

data.name: TopMenu_Settings
data.comment: Start with an underscore for keyboard accessibility

data.name: TopMenu_View
data.comment: Start with an underscore for keyboard accessibility

data.name: TopMenu_Go
data.comment: Start with an underscore for keyboard accessibility

data.name: TopMenu_Download
data.comment: Start with an underscore for keyboard accessibility

data.name: TopMenu_Tools
data.comment: Start with an underscore for keyboard accessibility

data.name: TopMenu_Help
data.comment: Start with an underscore for keyboard accessibility

data.name: Settings_GameDataPath_ToolTip
data.value: The path to the Data folder\nExample: Baldur's Gate 3/Data

data.name: Settings_LaunchDX11_ToolTip
data.value: If enabled, when launching the game, bg3_dx11.exe is used instead

data.name: Settings_GameStoryLogEnabled_ToolTip
data.value: When launching the game, enable the Osiris story log (osiris.log)

data.name: Settings_DisableLauncherTelemetry_ToolTip
data.value: Disable the telemetry options in the launcher\nTelemetry is always disabled if mods are active

data.name: Settings_DisableLauncherModWarnings_ToolTip
data.value: Disable the mod/data mismatch warnings in the launcher

data.name: Settings_LaunchType_ToolTip
data.value: Change how to launch the game

data.name: Settings_CustomLaunchAction_ToolTip
data.value: A file path, protocol, or custom process shell command to run

data.name: Settings_CustomLaunchArgs_ToolTip
data.value: Optional additional arguments to path to the custom launch command

data.name: Settings_LoadOrderPath_ToolTip
data.value: The folder containing mod load order .json files

data.name: Settings_AutoAddDependenciesWhenExporting_ToolTip
data.value: Automatically add dependency mods above their dependents in the exported load order, if omitted from the active order

data.name: Settings_DisableMissingModWarnings_ToolTip
data.value: If a load order is missing mods, no warnings will be displayed

data.name: Settings_CheckForUpdates_ToolTip
data.value: Automatically check for updates when the program starts

data.name: Settings_LimitToSingleInstance_ToolTip
data.value: Prevent the mod manager from launching multiple instances of the game\nThis can be bypassed by holding Shift when clicking on the launch button

data.name: Settings_DocumentsFolderPathOverride_ToolTip
data.value: [EXPERIMENTAL]\nOverride the default location to %LOCALAPPDATA%\\Larian Studios\\Baldur's Gate 3\nThis folder is used when exporting load orders, loading profiles, and loading mods.

data.name: Settings_EnableColorblindSupport_ToolTip
data.value: Enables some colorblind support, such as displaying icons for toolkit projects (which normally have a green background)

data.name: Settings_ShiftListFocusOnSwap_ToolTip
data.value: When moving selected mods to the opposite list with Enter, move focus to that list as well

data.name: Settings_ActionOnGameLaunch_ToolTip
data.value: When the game launches through the mod manager, this action will be performed

data.name: Settings_LogEnabled_ToolTip
data.value: Enable the log for the mod manager

data.name: Settings_DebugModeEnabled_ToolTip
data.value: This enables features for mod developers, such as being able to copy a mod's UUID in context menus, and additional Script Extender options

data.name: Settings_SaveWindowLocation_ToolTip
data.value: Save and restore the window location when the application starts.

data.name: Settings_DeleteModCrashSanityCheck_ToolTip
data.value: Automatically delete the %LOCALAPPDATA%/Larian Studios/Baldur's Gate 3/ModCrashSanityCheck folder, which may make certain mods deactivate if it exists

data.name: Settings_Language_ToolTip
data.value: The language to use in the mod manager

data.name: Settings_UpdateScriptExtender_ToolTip
data.value: If the Script Extender updater is installed (DXGI.dll), automatically update it via Tools/Toolbox.exe

data.name: Settings_UpdateGitHubMods_ToolTip
data.value: Automatically check for updates for mods configured with GitHub repository releases

data.name: Settings_UpdateNexusMods_ToolTip
data.value: Automatically check for updates for mods configured with NexusMods releases

data.name: Settings_UpdateModioMods_ToolTip
data.value: Automatically check for updates for mods configured with mod.io releases

data.name: Settings_NexusModsAPIKey_ToolTip
data.value: Your NexusMods API key, which will allow the mod manager to fetch mod updates/information

data.name: Settings_ModioAPIKey_ToolTip
data.value: Your mod.io Web API key, which will allow the mod manager to fetch mod updates/information from mod.io

data.name: Settings_MinimumUpdateTimePeriod_ToolTip
data.value: Prevent checking for updates for individual mods until this amount of time has passed since the last check\nThis is to prevent hitting API limits too quickly

data.name: Settings_AllowAdultContent_ToolTip
data.value: Allow adult content when downloading collections from NexusMods

data.name: LaunchGameType_Exe_ToolTip
data.value: Open the game exe directly,\nand create a steam_appid.txt in the bin folder if it doesn't exist,\nallowing you to bypassing the launcher

data.name: LaunchGameType_Steam_ToolTip
data.value: Open the game by running the Steam launch protocol ('steam://run/1086940')

data.name: LaunchGameType_Custom_ToolTip
data.value: Open the game by opening a different file or protocol (ex. a batch file or protocol handler like playnite://playnite/start/id)

data.name: ExtenderUpdateChannel_Devel_ToolTip
data.value: An update channel intended for developers, with potentially unstable updates

data.name: ExtenderUpdateChannel_Nightly_ToolTip
data.value: An update channel intended for developers, with bleeding-edge experimental updates

data.name: ModSourceType_GitHub_ToolTip
data.value: This mod's update source is from a GitHub repository

data.name: ModSourceType_NexusMods_ToolTip
data.value: This mod's update source is from NexusMods

data.name: ModSourceType_Modio_ToolTip
data.value: This mod's update source is from mod.io

data.name: Settings_Extender_ExportDefaultExtenderSettings_ToolTip
data.value: Export all values, even if it matches a default extender value

data.name: Settings_Extender_DeveloperMode_ToolTip
data.value: Enables various debug functionality for development purposes\nThis can be checked by mods to enable additional log messages and more

data.name: Settings_Extender_CustomProfile_ToolTip
data.value: Use a profile other than Public\nThis should be the profile folder name

data.name: Settings_Extender_CreateConsole_ToolTip
data.value: Creates a console window that logs extender internals\nMainly useful for debugging

data.name: Settings_Extender_LogFailedCompile_ToolTip
data.value: Log errors during Osiris story compilation to a log file (LogFailedCompile)

data.name: Settings_Extender_EnableLogging_ToolTip
data.value: Enable logging of Osiris activity (rule evaluation, queries, etc.) to a log file

data.name: Settings_Extender_LogCompile_ToolTip
data.value: Log Osiris story compilation to a log file

data.name: Settings_Extender_LogDirectory_ToolTip
data.value: Directory where the generated Osiris logs will be stored\nDefault is Documents\\OsirisLogs

data.name: Settings_Extender_LogRuntime_ToolTip
data.value: Log extender console and script output to a log file

data.name: Settings_Extender_DisableLauncher_ToolTip
data.value: Prevents the exe from force-opening the launcher\nMay not work correctly if extender auto-updating is enabled, or the --skip-launcher launch param is set

data.name: Settings_Extender_DisableStoryMerge_ToolTip
data.value: Prevents story.div.osi merging, which automatically happens when mods are present\nMay only occur when loading a save

data.name: Settings_Extender_DisableStoryPatching_ToolTip
data.value: Prevents patching story.bin with story.div.osi when loading saves, effectively preventing the Osiris scripts in the save from updating

data.name: Settings_Extender_ExtendStory_ToolTip
data.value: Enables extending Osiris functionality with the Script Extender, allowing custom functions.

data.name: Settings_Extender_SendCrashReports_ToolTip
data.value: Upload minidumps to the crash report collection server after a game crash

data.name: Settings_Extender_EnableDebugger_ToolTip
data.value: Enables the Osiris debugger interface (vscode extension)

data.name: Settings_Extender_DebuggerPort_ToolTip
data.value: Port number the Osiris debugger will listen on\nDefault: 9999

data.name: Settings_Extender_EnableLuaDebugger_ToolTip
data.value: Enables the Lua debugger interface (vscode extension)

data.name: Settings_Extender_LuaBuiltinResourceDirectory_ToolTip
data.value: An additional directory where the Script Extender will check for builtin scripts\nThis setting is meant for developers, to make it easier to test builtin script changes

data.name: Settings_Extender_ClearOnReset_ToolTip
data.value: Clears the extender console when the reset command is used

data.name: Settings_Extender_DefaultToClientConsole_ToolTip
data.value: Defaults the extender console to the client-side\nThis is setting is intended for developers

data.name: Settings_Extender_InsanityCheck_ToolTip
data.value: Disables the ModCrashSanityCheck jank that disables mods the next time the game runs

data.name: Settings_Extender_Optick_ToolTip
data.value: Enable attachment to the optick performance analyzer, which will profile scripted functions. Requires the 'Optick' program to be running.

data.name: Settings_Extender_EnablePerfMessages_ToolTip
data.value: Enable performance messages in the console window, which tracks the execution time of scripts and reports on long timespans.

data.name: Settings_Extender_ProfilerWarnings_ToolTip
data.value: Enable performance warning messages in the console window, which reports on long script executions.

data.name: Settings_Extender_ProfilerLoadThreshold_ToolTip
data.value: The warn/error threshold (in milliseconds) to display profiler load warnings.

data.name: Settings_Extender_ProfilerLoadCallbackThreshold_ToolTip
data.value: The warn/error threshold (in milliseconds) to display profiler load callback warnings.

data.name: Settings_Extender_ProfilerCallbackThreshold_ToolTip
data.value: The warn/error threshold (in milliseconds) to display profiler callback warnings.

data.name: Settings_Extender_ProfilerClientCallbackThreshold_ToolTip
data.value: The warn/error threshold (in milliseconds) to display profiler client-side callback warnings.

data.name: Settings_ExtenderUpdater_TargetVersion_ToolTip
data.value: Update to a specific version of the script extender (ex. '5.0.0.0')

data.name: Settings_ExtenderUpdater_TargetResourceDigest_ToolTip
data.value: Use a specific Digest for the target update

data.name: Settings_ExtenderUpdater_DisableUpdates_ToolTip
data.value: Disable automatic updating to the latest extender version

data.name: Settings_ExtenderUpdater_IPv4Only_ToolTip
data.value: Use only IPv4 when fetching the latest update

data.name: Settings_ExtenderUpdater_Debug_ToolTip
data.value: Enable debug mode in the extender updater, which prints more messages to the console window

data.name: Alert_Success_ScriptExtenderInstalled
data.value: Successfully installed the Extender updater {0} to '{1}'
data.comment: Placeholders: latest release url, executable directory

data.name: Alert_Success_ImportMods_None
data.value: Skipped importing mod - No .pak file found

data.name: Alert_Warning_ImportMods_Failure
data.value: No mods imported. Does the file contain a .pak?

data.name: Alert_Error_ImportMods_FailedWithException
data.value: Only imported {0}/{1} mods - Check the log

data.name: Alert_Success_ImportNexusModsIds_Multiple
data.value: Successfully imported NexusMods ids for {0} mods

data.name: Alert_Success_ImportNexusModsIds_Single
data.value: Successfully imported the NexusMods id for '{0}'

data.name: Alert_Success_PakFileExplorer_LoadedMods
data.comment: Placeholders: File names, separated by semicolons

data.name: Alert_Success_SaveCache
data.value: Saved mods cache to the BG3MM Data folder: {0}

data.name: Alert_Success_GenerateCache
data.value: Generated mods cache for all mods in the BG3MM Data folder: {0}

data.name: Alert_Warning_ImportNexusModsIds_Failure
data.value: No NexusMods ids found. Does the .zip name contain an id, with a .pak file inside?

data.name: Alert_Error_ImportNexusModsIds_FailedWithException
data.value: Encountered some errors fetching ids - Check the log

data.name: Alert_Error_ExtractSelectedAdventure
data.value: Error occurred when extracting adventure mod to '{0}'

data.name: Alert_Error_ScriptExtenderInstallationError
data.value: Error occurred when installing the Extender updater {0} - Check the log

data.name: Alert_Error_GameExePathInvalid
data.value: The 'Game Executable Path' is not set or is not valid

data.name: Alert_Error_GameDataFolderInvalid
data.value: Game Data folder is not valid. Please set it in the preferences window and refresh

data.name: Alert_Error_StartGameExeFailed
data.value: Failed to start game exe '{0}' - Check the 'Game Executable Path' in the preferences

data.name: Alert_Error_LaunchGame_NotFound
data.value: Failed to find game exe at "{0}"

data.name: Alert_Error_LaunchGame_CustomActionEmpty
data.value: The 'Launch - Custom Action' is empty. Set it in the preferences.

data.name: Alert_Error_Picker_GameDataPath_NoDataFolder
data.value: Failed to find Data folder with given installation directory

data.name: Alert_Error_Picker_GameDataPath_NoExe
data.value: Failed to find bg3.exe path with given installation directory

data.name: Alert_Error_ExportLoadOrderToArchiveAs
data.value: The current profile or the current mod order is null! Failed to export mod order

data.name: Alert_Warning_ExtractSelectedAdventure_NotExtratable
data.value: Current adventure mod '{0}' is not extractable

data.name: Alert_Warning_DocumentsFolderPathOverrideChanged
data.value: AppData path override set to '{0}' - Make sure to refresh

data.name: MessageBox_LoadSettings_PermissionDenied_Message
data.value: BG3MM lacks permission to read one or both of the following paths:\nGame Data Path: ({0})\nGame Executable Path: ({1}).

data.name: MessageBox_ScriptExtenderDownloadConfirmation_Message
data.value: Download and install the Script Extender? The Script Extender is used by mods to extend the scripting language of the game, allowing new functionality. The extender needs to only be installed once, as it automatically updates when you launch the game. Download url: {0} Directory the zip will be extracted to: {1}
data.comment: Placeholders: latest release url, executable directory

data.name: MessageBox_ScriptExtenderDownloadCompleted_Message
data.value: The Script Extender has been successfully downloaded.\n\nPlease start the game once to complete the installation process.

data.name: MessageBox_CustomLaunchError_Message
data.value: Error running custom launch '{0}' with args '{1}':\n{2}
data.comment: Placeholders: launch action, launch args, exception message

data.name: MessageBox_ExportLoadOrderToArchiveAsync_Message
data.value: Save active mods to a zip file?\nDepending on the number of mods, this may take some time.

data.name: MessageBox_GenerateCache_Message
data.value: Generate cache for all mods? This will create empty entries for mods that have no Nexus Mods id, mod.io id, or GitHub url set. This can allow you to edit these cache files manually, to directly set these ids, if desired.

data.name: MessageBox_DeleteCache_Message
data.value: Delete mod manager mod cache data? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Picker_GameDataPath_Description
data.value: Set the path to the Baldur's Gate 3 root installation folder

data.name: Picker_ExtractSelectedMods_Title
data.value: Select folder to extract mod(s) to...

data.name: Picker_ExtractSelectedAdventure_Title
data.value: Select folder to extract mod to...
